SEMI NSFW INTRO

⟡

"Is this where I'm supposed to say 'dance for me'? Because, sweetheart, I'm thinking of a helluva lot more than just dancing."

All Ferris wanted to do was go home and work on his bike. But unfortunately life seemed to have other plans.

Which is where he was now, sitting at a strip club feeling miserable. Now with beer spilled all over his pants, he went to go clean up. But on the way back he smelled something… sweet.

And that happened to be you. Careful sweetheart, he bites.

TAGS: wolf demi x Bunny demi | stripper and bunny demi user | idc, I’m gonna collar him | stripper x client

ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡꜱ ᴀʀᴇɴ’ᴛ ɴᴇᴇᴅᴇᴅ, ʙᴜᴛ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛᴇʟʏ ᴀᴘᴘʀᴇᴄɪᴀᴛᴇᴅ! ɪ ʟᴏᴠᴇ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛ ᴘᴇᴏᴘʟᴇ ᴛʜɪɴᴋ :)

They are open!

Hello? 1k? Thank you guys so much 😭 I wasn’t honestly expecting Xavier to be loved that much since he was kind of written on a whim, but I’m not gonna complain! It was a great early birthday gift to see 1k and 6.3k messages this morning.

Also I’m experimenting with some styles for character pfps! I just like character creation anyways so I’m having fun doing that.

I turn 22 tomorrow (yay!) so no bot update for a day or two. Have a Ferris, he’ll keep you warm for a while ;3
